findings.description: Column names FILE_CONTROL_ID and FILE_OBJECT are defined in the FILE_CONTROL table in the source but absent from s4 hints. These are decision-relevant identifiers (primary key and binary storage column).
findings.source_evidence: テーブル定義: FILE_CONTROL_ID（ファイル管理ID、主キー）、FILE_OBJECT（ファイル内容、バイナリ）
